# agentsfleet — Fleet Delivery Control Plane

## Machine-readable API surfaces
- OpenAPI spec: /openapi.json
- agentsfleet manifest: /agentsfleet-manifest.json (JSON Linked Data)
- Skill description: /skill.md
- Health/status: /heartbeat
- Documentation: /docs

## API base
https://agentsfleet.net/v1

## Operations (operationId: method path)
Status transitions ride PATCH on the fleet resource — body {status: "active"|"stopped"|"killed"}.
"paused" is a platform-only state set by the anomaly gate; not callable from the API.
- create_fleet:        POST   /v1/workspaces/{workspace_id}/fleets
- list_fleet_bundles: GET /v1/fleets/bundles
- import_fleet_bundle: POST   /v1/workspaces/{workspace_id}/fleets/bundles/snapshots
- get_fleet_bundle:    GET    /v1/workspaces/{workspace_id}/fleets/bundles/snapshots/{bundle_id}
- update_fleet:        PATCH  /v1/workspaces/{workspace_id}/fleets/{fleet_id}     # body: {config_json}
- stop_fleet:          PATCH  /v1/workspaces/{workspace_id}/fleets/{fleet_id}     # body: {status:"stopped"}    — halt session, resumable
- resume_fleet:        PATCH  /v1/workspaces/{workspace_id}/fleets/{fleet_id}     # body: {status:"active"}     — resume from stopped/paused
- kill_fleet:          PATCH  /v1/workspaces/{workspace_id}/fleets/{fleet_id}     # body: {status:"killed"}     — terminal mark (irreversible)
- delete_fleet:        DELETE /v1/workspaces/{workspace_id}/fleets/{fleet_id}     # hard-purge; precondition status='killed'
- post_fleet_message:  POST   /v1/workspaces/{workspace_id}/fleets/{fleet_id}/messages   # steer / chat
- list_fleet_events:   GET    /v1/workspaces/{workspace_id}/fleets/{fleet_id}/events
- stream_fleet_events: GET    /v1/workspaces/{workspace_id}/fleets/{fleet_id}/events/stream
- ingest_connector_webhook: POST /v1/ingress/{provider}
- ingest_fleet_webhook: POST  /v1/webhooks/{fleet_id}
- get_tenant_billing:         GET /v1/tenants/me/billing
- get_tenant_billing_charges: GET /v1/tenants/me/billing/charges
- get_tenant_metering_periods: GET /v1/tenants/me/billing/charges/{event_id}/telemetry

## Authentication
Bearer token: Authorization: Bearer <api_key>

## Execution model
A Fleet is a long-lived, event-driven autonomous worker scoped to a workspace.
Inbound events arrive via `POST /v1/webhooks/{fleet_id}` (or other configured
triggers) and are appended to the Fleet's event stream. The control plane
(`agentsfleetd`) assigns each event to a host-resident `agentsfleet-runner` via a lease;
the runner runs the Fleet's loop, which can call tools, update state,
and emit further events. Operators steer or kill running Fleets through the
control-plane endpoints above.
